Home/Privacy Policy

Privacy Policy

At The Prime Crafters, your privacy is not an afterthought — it is built into everything we do. This policy explains clearly and honestly how we collect, use, store, and protect the information you share with us when you visit our website or engage our AI automation services.

Last updated: June 2, 2026
The Prime Crafters
aman@theprimecrafters.com

Our Commitment
to Your Privacy

Your trust makes our work possible. The Prime Crafters is an AI automation agency that works closely with businesses to build intelligent systems — and we understand better than most how sensitive data can be.

We are committed to protecting the privacy of every visitor, enquirer, and client who interacts with us, whether through this website, our contact forms, discovery calls, or active project engagements. This policy covers what information we collect, why we collect it, how it is used, and what rights you have over it.

We do not sell your data. We do not use it for advertising. We handle it with the same care we would want applied to our own.

Data Protection
Industry-standard safeguards applied
Never Sold
Your data is never sold or rented
Full Transparency
Clear policy, plain language
Your Rights
Request access, updates, or deletion
Data Collection

Information We Collect

Understanding what data we hold starts with knowing how it reaches us. We collect information in three ways: directly from you, automatically through your use of our website, and through active project work with clients.

Direct Input

Information You Provide Directly

When you contact us, complete a form, book a discovery call, or begin an engagement with The Prime Crafters, you may share the following:

You are always in control of what you share. We only ask for what is necessary.

  • Full name and email address — to identify you and respond to your enquiry
  • Phone number — if provided, used only for scheduled calls or follow-ups
  • Company name and website URL — to understand your business context before any consultation
  • Service interest and project details — to scope your requirements and prepare relevant proposals
  • Messages, notes, and uploaded files — any content you choose to share to support your enquiry or project

How We Use
Your Information

Every piece of data The Prime Crafters holds has a specific, legitimate purpose. We never use personal data for advertising, audience profiling, or third-party marketing purposes.

We never use personal data for advertising, audience profiling, or third-party marketing purposes. Information shared with us is strictly used to deliver, improve, and support the services you request from The Prime Crafters.

01

Respond to Enquiries

We use your name and contact details to reply promptly and accurately to questions submitted through our website or email.

02

Schedule and Prepare for Consultations

Booking data allows us to confirm discovery calls, set reminders, and review your business context before the session.

03

Scope and Prepare Proposals

Project information you share helps us understand your requirements and build accurate, relevant proposals for your review.

04

Deliver AI Automation Services

Client data shared during active engagements is used solely to design, build, test, and deploy the AI systems and workflows you have contracted us for.

05

Improve Website Performance

Aggregated analytics data is used to identify slow pages, improve navigation, and refine the content on this site.

06

Support Active and Past Clients

We retain relevant engagement history to provide continuity of service, answer ongoing questions, and support post-delivery needs.

07

Prevent Abuse and Maintain Security

Technical and behavioural data helps us detect spam submissions, unauthorised access attempts, and other forms of misuse.

Cookies and Analytics

Like most professional websites, theprimecrafters.com uses cookies to function correctly and to gather anonymised usage data that helps us improve the experience for all visitors.

What is a cookie? A cookie is a small text file placed on your device when you visit a website. It does not give us access to your device or personal files.

Managing your cookies: You can control and delete cookies at any time through your browser settings. Disabling optional cookies will not affect core website functionality. You may also opt out of Google Analytics tracking directly using Google's Analytics Opt-Out Browser Add-on.

Cookie CategoryStatusWhat It DoesExamples
Essential CookiesAlways ActiveRequired for the website to load and function. Covers security, session management, and core page features.Session tokens, CSRF protection
Analytics CookiesOptionalRecords anonymised visit data including pages viewed, session duration, and traffic source. Helps us understand how the site is used.Google Analytics (_ga, _gid)
Tag Management CookiesOptionalManages the loading of third-party tracking scripts such as ad pixels and analytics tools through Google Tag Manager.GTM container cookies (_gtm)

Manage by Browser

Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and other site data
Preferences → Privacy → Manage Website Data
Settings → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data
Settings → Cookies and Site Permissions → Cookies
You may also opt out of Google Analytics tracking directly using Google's Analytics Opt-Out Browser Add-on.

How We Share Your Information

The Prime Crafters does not sell, rent, lease, or trade your personal data — under any circumstances. Your information is shared only in the two specific situations described below.

Trusted Service Providers

To operate our website and deliver AI automation services to clients, we work with a curated set of third-party tools and platforms. These providers are permitted to process your data only to the extent needed to support the specific service they provide to us. They are contractually prohibited from using it for any other purpose.

Relevant categories of service providers include:

  • ◆Website hosting and infrastructure — for reliable, secure website delivery
  • ◆Analytics and tag management — for aggregated site performance data
  • ◆CRM and client management tools — for organising enquiries and client records
  • ◆Scheduling and calendar platforms — for managing discovery calls and consultations
  • ◆Email and communication tools — for sending replies, proposals, and project updates
  • ◆Payment processors — for handling project invoices securely
  • ◆Security and monitoring tools — for protecting the website and client systems
  • ◆Automation platforms — used within client project delivery stacks

Legal or Security Requirements

In rare circumstances, we may be required or permitted by law to disclose personal information, including to:

  • ◆Comply with a legal obligation, court order, or lawful government request
  • ◆Investigate or prevent fraud, data breaches, or illegal activity
  • ◆Protect the rights, safety, or property of The Prime Crafters, our clients, or the general public
  • ◆Enforce our Terms and Conditions or other agreements

Any such disclosure will be limited to what is strictly necessary and handled through appropriate legal channels.

Data Security

Protecting the information you share with us is a responsibility we take seriously. The Prime Crafters applies layered security practices across our systems, tools, and processes.

Our security approach includes:

Important: No digital system — however well protected — can be guaranteed 100% secure

While we apply every reasonable safeguard, we cannot warrant absolute security against all possible threats.

If you have any concerns about the security of your data, please contact us immediately. We treat all security concerns as a priority.

Industry-Standard Encryption

Data transmitted to and from our website is encrypted via HTTPS/TLS, protecting your information in transit against interception or tampering.

Restricted Access Controls

Personal and client data is accessible only to team members and service providers who genuinely need it for their role.

Secure Platform Selection

We prefer tools and platforms that maintain strong security certifications, regular audits, and transparent data practices.

Post-Project Credential Management

Access credentials and sensitive data shared during client projects are managed securely and removed when no longer required.

Data Retention

We do not hold on to data longer than necessary. Retention periods are determined by the original purpose for which data was collected and any applicable legal or contractual obligations.

Data TypeRetention Period
Website enquiries and contact form submissions
Duration of enquiry plus up to 12 months
Discovery call and consultation records
Duration of pre-engagement period plus up to 12 months
Active client project data
Duration of engagement plus up to 24 months post-completion
Financial and invoicing records
Up to 7 years (legal/tax compliance)
Security and abuse logs
Up to 12 months
Anonymised analytics data
Up to 26 months (standard Google Analytics window)

When data is no longer required, it is securely deleted or anonymised so it can no longer be linked to you. You may also request deletion of your data at any time — see Your Privacy Rights below.

Your Privacy Rights

Depending on your location and the privacy laws that apply to you — including GDPR (EU/UK), CCPA (California), or PDPA (Thailand and others) — you may have the following rights over the personal data we hold.

These rights may include access, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, data portability, objection to processing, and withdrawal of consent where applicable.

Access, Update, or Delete Your Information

To submit a privacy request, contact us directly. We aim to respond to all valid privacy requests within 30 days. In some cases, we may need to verify your identity before fulfilling a request in order to protect your data from unauthorised access.

Submit a Privacy Request

Email: aman@theprimecrafters.com or use our contact form to submit a privacy-related request.

Right of Access

Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you, along with information about how it is processed.

Right to Rectification

Ask us to correct any inaccurate or incomplete information we hold about you.

Right to Erasure

Request deletion of your personal data where we no longer have a legal basis to retain it.

Right to Restrict Processing

Ask us to pause the processing of your data in certain circumstances.

Right to Data Portability

Request your data in a structured, machine-readable format where technically feasible.

Right to Object

Object to our processing of your data for direct marketing or legitimate interest purposes.

Right to Withdraw Consent

Where processing is based on your consent, you may withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.

Third-Party Links and Tools

Our website may include links to external websites, third-party platforms, booking pages, or embedded tools for your convenience. Once you navigate away from theprimecrafters.com or interact with an embedded third-party service, The PrimeCrafters has no control over how your data is handled.

Third-party services that may be present on or linked from this site include:

  • Discovery call scheduling — tools such as Calendly, Cal.com, or Google Calendar may be used to book consultations. Their own privacy policies apply.
  • Payment processing — project invoices are handled through secure third-party processors such as Stripe or PayPal. We do not store card details.
  • Embedded widgets — pages may include third-party chat tools, interactive demos, or AI tools. Each is governed by the provider's own terms.
  • External resource links — we may reference useful articles, tools, or platforms. Visiting those sites is subject to their own privacy policies.

Last updated: June 2, 2026

A link or integration does not indicate endorsement of a third party's privacy or data practices. We encourage you to review the privacy policy of any service you interact with. Get in touch if you have any questions.

Policy Updates and Privacy Contact

We review and update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our services, technology, tools, or legal obligations. We encourage you to review this page periodically. If you bookmarked an older version, the current policy is always at theprimecrafters.com/privacy-policy.

Keeping This Policy Current

When updates are made:

  • The revised policy is published on this page immediately
  • The "Last Updated" date at the top of the page is changed to reflect the update
  • Where changes are material, active clients may be notified directly
  • Continued use of our website after any update constitutes acceptance of the revised terms

Contact Us About Privacy

For any questions, concerns, or requests related to this Privacy Policy or the way we handle your data, please reach out directly. We take all privacy enquiries seriously and respond promptly.

Email: aman@theprimecrafters.com
Contact Page: theprimecrafters.com/contact

Contact Us
